AutomaticReleaseOfPostpaidSettings.action: Operation to perform on the instance; current valid value: autorelease
AutomaticReleaseOfPostpaidSettings.{clientToken}: Idempotency token; an ASCII string of up to 64 characters, see [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AutomaticReleaseOfPostpaidSettings.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the pay-as-you-go EIP bound to the instance is automatically released along with the instance; true: yes, false: no. Takes effect only when the public bandwidth billing method is pay-by-bandwidth or pay-by-traffic. Default: false
AutomaticReleaseOfPostpaidSettings.releaseTime: Scheduled release time in the format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'; omit this parameter to cancel the scheduled release
